problem: Add a recurring billing feature to the existing acme-platform: subscription plans, payment method management, invoice generation, and dunning flow — without breaking existing user management or notification centre.
primaryUser: Finance team (creates plans, reviews invoices); end-users who manage their own subscriptions through the self-serve portal
successCriteria: Stripe Billing integrated; subscriptions created/upgraded/cancelled correctly; failed-payment dunning triggers 3-attempt retry logic; invoices stored in DB and emailed; existing tests remain green; feature-flagged for gradual rollout.

stories.title: Stripe Integration & Webhooks
stories.description: Configure Stripe SDK; implement webhook handler with idempotency guard; store raw events in stripe_events table for replay.

stories.title: Subscription Plans API
stories.description: Admin CRUD for plans (name, price, interval, features JSON); sync with Stripe Products; versioned so existing subscribers keep old plan terms.

stories.title: Payment Methods & Checkout
stories.description: Stripe Payment Element embedded in React; save/default/delete payment methods; SCA (3-D Secure) flow handled.

stories.title: Invoice Generation
stories.description: Generate PDF invoice on every payment event; store in S3; send via notification centre; downloadable from self-serve portal.

stories.title: Dunning & Retry Flow
stories.description: BullMQ job: retry failed payment at day 1, 4, 7; email customer each attempt via notification centre; downgrade to free tier after final failure.

stackConstraints: Existing NestJS + Prisma + PostgreSQL stack; React 18 frontend; BullMQ for job queues; must not break /users or /notifications APIs
externalIntegrations: Stripe Billing & Webhooks, AWS S3 for invoice PDFs, existing notification centre integration
openQuestions: Are per-seat and flat-rate plans both needed in v1?
Proration on mid-cycle upgrades: yes or no?
Should failed-payment downgrade be reversible within 30 days?

modelRecommendation.estimatedCostNote: Estimated $1.20–$2.00 — existing context read adds tokens; recommend loading codebase summary before synthesis
